case_title: DANTE VILLAR GERVACIO VS. SOHUI WON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,286.91 FILED BY GERVACIO, DANTE VILLAR AS TO DEFENDANT WON, SOHUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PLAINTIFF DANTE VILLAR GERVACIO IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY SPANISH COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA (#301593). DEFENDANT SOHUI WON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-26-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERVACIO, DANTE VILLAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WON, SOHUI DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
